hook.summary: Simpsons-style animation of Egyptian characters playing poker in a tomb.
hook.visual_action: A character reveals two Aces while sitting at a poker table in an ancient Egyptian setting.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I think we're done here. I'm all in.

scene_flow: Egyptian-themed Simpsons-style characters play poker in a tomb.
One character reveals two Aces and another goes all-in.
The first character wins the pot, causing shock among the others.
Transition to real gameplay showing a Royal Flush win.
End card with game title and 'PLAY NOW' button.
audience_proxy: Adult fans of poker games and animated sitcoms like The Simpsons.
